name: trident
description: Ambient memory architecture for OpenClaw agents. Three-tier persistent memory system combining LCM durability, semantic routing, and hierarchical organization for agent continuity and identity development.

activation.description: Automatic signal routing and memory consolidation

layer0_enabled.description: Enable Layer 0 LCM (lossless capture). Required for all other layers.

layer0_5_enabled.description: Enable Layer 0.5 signal router (cron agent). Requires Layer 0.

layer0_5_interval_minutes.description: Signal routing interval in minutes (10-30 min recommended for cost-effectiveness)

layer0_5_model.description: Model for Layer 0.5 signal router. Haiku recommended for cost. Use ollama/* for zero-cost local inference.

layer0_5_custom_model.description: Custom model provider/name when layer0_5_model is 'custom'

workspace_path.description: Workspace root directory (typically ~/.openclaw/workspace). If omitted, uses $OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE or infers from cwd.

memory_bucket_path.description: Relative path from workspace_path where Trident buckets are stored

semantic_recall_enabled.description: Enable optional semantic recall (Qdrant + FalkorDB). Requires Layer 0 and Layer 0.5.

qdrant_enabled.description: Enable Qdrant vector search for semantic recall

qdrant_url.description: Qdrant server URL (Docker, local binary, or cloud)

qdrant_collection.description: Qdrant collection name for memory embeddings

qdrant_api_key.description: API key for Qdrant Cloud (optional, for cloud deployments)

falkordb_enabled.description: Enable FalkorDB entity graph for semantic recall

falkordb_url.description: FalkorDB connection URL (Redis or FalkorDB Cloud)

git_backup_enabled.description: Enable daily Git backup of memory (requires git init in workspace)

git_backup_hour.description: Hour of day (0-23) for daily Git backup cron job

embedding_model.description: Embedding model for semantic recall. Only used if semantic_recall_enabled=true.

audit_logging_enabled.description: Enable audit logging for Layer 0.5 routing decisions (written to memory/layer0/audit-log.md)

template_integrity_check.description: Verify Layer 0.5 AGENT-PROMPT.md SHA256 before each routing run (security feature)

wipe_on_upgrade.description: Dangerous: if true, wipes memory on plugin upgrade. Use only for testing.

plugins.name: lossless-claw
plugins.reason: Layer 0 requires LCM (Lossless Context Management) for SQLite+DAG persistence

system.name: docker
system.reason: Optional: required only if using Qdrant/FalkorDB via Docker

install.description: Initialize Trident directory structure and copy templates

activate.description: Enable cron job for Layer 0.5 signal router

deactivate.description: Disable cron job for Layer 0.5 signal router (preserves memory)

uninstall.description: Uninstall Trident. Memory is never automatically deleted. Use 'rm -r ~/.openclaw/workspace/memory' to remove memory files.
